title: Packaged Commodities Amendment Rules 2014

"Cf'. ~e;re, ~ (~ l1('tI ~) ~: ~ ~ '1R'I'I' <t ~"If 31fl..nr'I"ff~.m.<tiT.f.f. 202( 31). ~ 7lll"tf, 2011 ef; IDll 'Illfilfm ~ Tf'Q; ~ am 3I'fi:rq tmltR ~~. m.<tiT.f.f. 359(31), mfu!l6~, 2013 IDU~~ 1"f'Cl: I (Depanmentof Consumer Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi,the 16th June, 2014 GS.R. 137.-ln exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (I) read with clause (j) of sub-section (2) of Section 52 of the Legal Metrology Act, 2009 (1 or20 10), the CentralGovernment hereby makes the following rules further to amend th(~Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) Rules 2011, namely:.- I. (I) These rules may be called as Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) (Amendment) Rules, 2014. (2) They shaHcome into force with effect from IstJuly, 2014. 2. In the Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) Rules2011, in rule 6, after sub-rule (7). the following shall be inserted, namely ;.-- 25<1 CAF&P[)'~(lt4 (1) __ · ._m. _ -- 1 of 2 -- (2) "(8) Every package containing soap, shampoos, tooth pastes and other cosmetics and toiletries shall bear at the top of its principal display panel a red or as the case may be. brown dot for products of non-vegetarian origin and a green dot products of vegetarian origin.". [F. No. WM·I0(38)i20J3] B. N. DIXIT, Director (Legal Metrology) Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of'India, vide notification number G.S,R. 202(E), dated the 7th March, 2011 and last amended vide notification number GS.R. 359(E), dated the 6th June, 20D.
